name: Chinese Sweet & Sour Soup
recipeIngredient: 2 cans (10.5 oz each) Condensed beef broth
1 can (13.5 oz) Diced tomatoes and liquid
recipeInstructions:
1. Skin the chicken with a sharp knife and cut into thin 2-inch long slices.
2. Sprinkle the sliced chicken with salt.
3. Mix the cornstarch with 3 tablespoons water and soy sauce in a bowl.
4. Combine the mixture with the condensed beef broth and water in a pot.
5. Bring the soup to a boil, stirring often.
6. Add the chicken, mushrooms, and liquid (diced tomatoes) to the pot.
7. Stir in the vinegar and sugar.
8. Simmer for 5 minutes.
9. Serve with a slice of lemon in each bowl and a cruet of vinegar on the table.
10. Makes 4 to 6 servings.
